case_title: DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP VS. JOSE F. SOBREVILLA AGUILERA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $790.47 FILED BY DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP AS TO DEFENDANT SOBREVILLA AGUILERA, JOSE F. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-22-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED OCT-23-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SOBREVILLA AGUILERA, JOSE F.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-22-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-14-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. JPT ELIZABETH RILES. CLERK: A. PASCUAL. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-14-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-24-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-24-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUL-31-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-31-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-15-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: DONALD S. MITCHELL. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-31-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOBREVILLA AGUILERA, JOSE F. $790.47 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $860.47, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SOBREVILLA AGUILERA, JOSE F.
